Question: When is my monthly internet bill generated?
Answer: Your billing cycle starts on the 1st of every month. Invoices are automatically generated and sent via email on the 3rd, with payment due by the 15th of the same month.

Question: What happens if I exceed the 15 GB data cap on the Basic Tier?
Answer: Your internet connection will not be cut off. However, your speed will be throttled to 256 Kbps for the remainder of your billing cycle. You can upgrade to the Standard Tier at any time for unlimited data.

Question: How can I reset my broadband Wi-Fi router?
Answer: Unplug the power cable from the back of the router, wait exactly 30 seconds, and plug it back in. It takes roughly 2 to 3 minutes for all status indicator lights to turn solid green.

Question: Where can I check if there is an active internet outage in my area?
Answer: You can view real-time network maintenance logs and localized outages via our Status page or text 'STATUS' to our automated customer helpline.

Question: Can I upgrade my internet package in the middle of the month?
Answer: Yes, package upgrades take effect immediately. The price difference between your current tier and the new tier will be calculated and applied pro-rata to your next billing statement.

Question: Is there a fee for cancelling my subscription contract?
Answer: Standard and Premium packages are on month-to-month contracts and can be cancelled anytime without penalty. Early cancellation of a promotional contract may incur a flat $50 termination fee.
